name: Tactical Jump Drive
desc: Ship jumps just right in the middle of combat but starts with flux buildup depending on hull size %s/%s/%s/%s.
sModDesc:
Now you can add an sMod that:

Removes the movement and flux penalty at the start
For 10 seconds:
-Flux dissipation +25%%
-Shield turn rate +50%%
-Shield raise/unfold speed +50%%

name: Tactical Retreat Jump Drive
desc: Allows ships to retreat by tactical jump when ordered to retreat needs to have 0 flux and charge for for 2s/3s/4s/5s depending on hull size.
